sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87012" key="prodiasaleu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προδια-σᾰλεύω</orth>, <sense id="n87012.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shake beforehand,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">περιπάτῳ ἢ αἰώρᾳ τὸ σωμάτιον</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Agathin.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:10:7:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.7.15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
